=== mentions/create_all ===
     1	module Mentions
     2	  # This class creates mentions + associated notifications for Articles and Comments.
     3	  # This class will check to see if there are any @-mentions in the post, and will
     4	  # create the associated mentions inline if necessary.
     5	  class CreateAll
     6	    def self.call(...)
     7	      new(...).call
     8	    end
     9	
    10	    def initialize(notifiable)
    11	      @notifiable = notifiable
    12	    end
    13	
    14	    def call
    15	      mentioned_users = users_mentioned_in_text_excluding_author
    16	
    17	      delete_mentions_removed_from_notifiable_text(mentioned_users)
    18	      create_mentions_for(mentioned_users)
    19	    end
    20	
    21	    private
    22	
    23	    def users_mentioned_in_text_excluding_author
    24	      mentioned_usernames = extract_usernames_from_mentions_in_text
    25	
    26	      collect_existing_users(mentioned_usernames)
    27	        .then do |existing_mentioned_users|
    28	          reject_notifiable_author(existing_mentioned_users)
    29	        end
    30	    end
    31	
    32	    def collect_existing_users(usernames)
    33	      User.registered.where(username: usernames)
    34	    end
    35	
    36	    def create_mentions_for(users)
    37	      users.each { |user| create_mention_for(user) }
    38	    end
    39	
    40	    def extract_usernames_from_mentions_in_text
    41	      # The "mentioned-user" css is added by Html::Parser#user_link_if_exists
    42	      doc = Nokogiri::HTML(notifiable.processed_html)
    43	
    44	      # Remove any mentions that are embedded within any liquid tags
    45	      non_liquid_tag_mentions = doc.css(".mentioned-user").reject do |tag|
    46	        tag.ancestors(".liquid-comment").any? ||
    47	          tag.ancestors("[class^=ltag]").any? ||
    48	          tag.ancestors("[class*=' ltag']").any?
    49	      end
    50	
    51	      non_liquid_tag_mentions.map { |link| link.text.delete("@").downcase }
    52	    end
    53	
    54	    def reject_notifiable_author(users)
    55	      users.reject { |user| authored_by?(user, notifiable) }
    56	    end
    57	
    58	    def authored_by?(user, notifiable)
    59	      user.id == notifiable.user_id
    60	    end
    61	
    62	    def delete_mentions_removed_from_notifiable_text(users)
    63	      mentions = notifiable.mentions.where.not(user_id: users).destroy_all
    64	      Notification.remove_all(notifiable_ids: mentions.map(&:id), notifiable_type: "Mention") if mentions.present?
    65	    end
    66	
    67	    def user_has_comment_notifications?(user)
    68	      user.notifications.exists?(notifiable_id: notifiable.id, notifiable_type: "Comment")
    69	    end
    70	
    71	    def create_mention_for(user)
    72	      # Do not create additional notifications for being mentioned in a comment.
    73	      if notifiable.is_a?(Comment) && user_has_comment_notifications?(user)
    74	        return
    75	      end
    76	
    77	      # The mentionable_type is the model that created the mention, the user is the user to be mentioned.
    78	      mention = Mention.create(user_id: user.id, mentionable_id: notifiable.id,
    79	                               mentionable_type: notifiable.class.name)
    80	
    81	      # If notifiable is an Article, we need to create the notification for the mention immediately so
    82	      # that the notification exists in the database before we attempt to create other Article-related notifications.
    83	      # However, if notifiable is a Comment, we can create the notification for the mention in the background.
    84	      case notifiable
    85	      when Article
    86	        Notification.send_mention_notification_without_delay(mention)
    87	      when Comment
    88	        Notification.send_mention_notification(mention)
    89	      end
    90	
    91	      mention
    92	    end
    93	
    94	    attr_reader :notifiable
    95	  end
    96	end

=== moderator/unpublish_all_articles ===
     1	# Unpublish posts and delete comments w/ boolean attr (setting deleted: true) to allow revert
     2	# Create a corresponding audit_log record
     3	module Moderator
     4	  class UnpublishAllArticles
     5	    def self.call(...)
     6	      new(...).call
     7	    end
     8	
     9	    # @param target_user_id [Integer] the id of the user whose posts are being unpublished
    10	    # @param action_user_id [Integer] the id of the user who unpublishes
    11	    # @param listener [String] listener for the audit logger
    12	    def initialize(target_user_id:, action_user_id:, listener: :admin_api)
    13	      @target_user_id = target_user_id
    14	      @action_user_id = action_user_id
    15	      @listener = listener
    16	    end
    17	
    18	    delegate :user_data, to: Notifications
    19	
    20	    def call
    21	      user = User.find_by(id: target_user_id)
    22	      return unless user
    23	
    24	      target_comments = user.comments.where(deleted: false)
    25	      target_articles = user.articles.published
    26	
    27	      # cache for logging
    28	      target_comments_ids = target_comments.ids
    29	      target_articles_ids = target_articles.ids
    30	
    31	      target_comments.update(deleted: true)
    32	
    33	      target_articles.find_each do |article|
    34	        if article.has_frontmatter?
    35	          article.body_markdown.sub!(/^published:\s*true\s*$/, "published: false")
    36	        end
    37	        article.published = false
    38	        article.save(validate: false)
    39	        clean_up_notifications(article)
    40	      end
    41	
    42	      payload = {
    43	        target_user_id: target_user_id,
    44	        target_article_ids: target_articles_ids,
    45	        target_comment_ids: target_comments_ids
    46	      }
    47	
    48	      audit_log(payload)
    49	    end
    50	
    51	    private
    52	
    53	    attr_reader :target_user_id, :action_user_id, :listener
    54	
    55	    def clean_up_notifications(article)
    56	      Notification.remove_all_by_action_without_delay(notifiable_ids: article.id,
    57	                                                      notifiable_type: "Article",
    58	                                                      action: "Published")
    59	
    60	      ContextNotification.delete_by(context_id: article.id, context_type: "Article", action: "Published")
    61	
    62	      return unless article.comments.exists?
    63	
    64	      Notification.remove_all(notifiable_ids: article.comments.ids, notifiable_type: "Comment")
    65	    end
    66	
    67	    def audit_log(payload = {})
    68	      payload["action"] = listener == :moderator ? "unpublish_all_articles" : "api_user_unpublish"
    69	      action_user = User.find_by(id: action_user_id)
    70	      Audit::Logger.log(listener, action_user, payload)
    71	    end
    72	  end
    73	end

content.content:
=== article.rb current_state_path / url / decorate ===
  def url
    URL.article(self)
  end

  def username
    return organization.slug if organization

    user.username
  end

  def current_state_path
    published && !scheduled? ? "/#{username}/#{slug}" : "/#{username}/#{slug}?preview=#{password}"
  end

  def has_frontmatter?
    processed_content.has_front_matter?
  end

  def edited?
    edited_at.present?
  end

  def readable_edit_date
    return unless edited?

    if edited_at.year == Time.current.year
      I18n.l(edited_at, format: :short)
    else
      I18n.l(edited_at, format: :short_with_yy)
    end
  end

  def skip_indexing?
    # should the article be skipped indexed by crawlers?
    # true if unpublished, or spammy,
    # or low score, and not featured
    !published ||
      (score < Settings::UserExperience.index_minimum_score && !featured) ||
      published_at.to_i < Settings::UserExperience.index_minimum_date.to_i ||
      score < -1
  end

  def skip_indexing_reason
    return "unpublished" unless published
    return "negative_score" if score < -1
    return "below_minimum_score" if score < Settings::UserExperience.index_minimum_score && !featured
    return "below_minimum_date" if published_at.to_i < Settings::UserExperience.index_minimum_date.to_i

    "indexed"
  end

  def displayable_published_at
    crossposted_at.presence || published_at
  end

  def title_for_metadata
    return title unless type_of == "status" && title.present?

    # For quickies, return a clean single-line version of the title
    # Replace line breaks with spaces and normalize whitespace
    title.gsub(/\s*\n\s*/, " ").gsub(/\s+/, " ").strip
  end

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive picture. Let me write up the full audit.

---

# Article Contract Audit — Forem

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What it is.** Forem is the Rails monolith that powers dev.to: a social blogging/community platform. Ruby on Rails (Rails 8-prep, see `cdb805c`), Sidekiq for background jobs, PostgreSQL (with `pgvector`, hair_trigger DB triggers, pg_search), Fastly edge caching, Algolia search, Preact frontend.

**Layout** (`app/`):
- `models/` — ActiveRecord; concerns in `models/concerns/`, namespaced helpers in `models/articles/`, `models/feeds/`.
- `services/` — business logic (PORO service objects, e.g. `services/articles/`, `services/notifications/`, `services/edge_cache/`, `services/feeds/`, `services/mentions/`).
- `workers/` — Sidekiq jobs (`workers/articles/`, etc.).
- `controllers/`, `queries/`, `policies/`, `decorators/`, `serializers/`, `liquid_tags/`, `views/`.

**The central content model.** `app/models/article.rb` (1858 lines) — the thing readers publish; comments, reactions, tags, mentions, notifications, feeds and analytics all hang off it. It is built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/` and a serialization/caching helper namespace `app/models/articles/` (`cached_entity.rb`, `feeds.rb`). Its lifecycle is driven by `app/services/articles/` (`creator.rb`, `updater.rb`, `destroyer.rb`, `unpublish.rb`) and fans out to `app/workers/articles/` + `app/services/edge_cache/`.

---

## Step 2 — The Article contract and what it's built on

**Model:** `app/models/article.rb:1`

**Concerns included** (`article.rb:2-10`), each with its own associations/callbacks the teardown must respect:
- `LiquidEmbeddable` — `app/models/concerns/liquid_embeddable.rb:1`; adds `has_many :liquid_embed_references, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`), syncs on body/score/published change.
- `Reactable` — `app/models/concerns/reactable.rb:1`; adds `has_many :reactions, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`) + `distinct_reaction_categories`, count-sync helpers.
- `Taggable` — `app/models/concerns/taggable.rb:1`; `cached_tagged_with*` scopes (`:6,:28,:53`), `before_save :sync_tags_array` (`:57`).
- `UserSubscriptionSourceable` — `app/models/concerns/user_subscription_sourceable.rb:1`; `has_many :user_subscriptions, dependent: :nullify` (`:7`).
- `AlgoliaSearchable` — `app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable.rb:1` → mixes in `AlgoliaSearchable::SearchableArticle` (`app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1`); indexes title/body/user, `indexable` gate at `:42`.
- `WebpageTrackable` — `app/models/concerns/webpage_trackable.rb:1`; `has_many :webpage_references, dependent: :delete_all` (`:5`), captures domains before destroy (`:8`), enqueues `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` after destroy (`:9`).
- `CloudinaryHelper`, `ActionView::Helpers` (view helpers), `PgSearch::Model` (search), plus `StringAttributeCleaner` (`article.rb:15`).
- Note: `Trackable` (`app/models/concerns/trackable.rb`) is **not** included by Article (only `app/models/user.rb`) — a teammate should not assume Article fires trackable events.

**Associations defined directly** (`article.rb:44-241`) — the teardown surface:
- `belongs_to`: `collection` (optional, `:44`), `organization` (optional, `:46`), `user` (`:47`), `subforem` (optional, `:48`); `counter_culture :user`/`:organization` (`:50-51`).
- `has_one :discussion_lock, dependent: :delete` (`:168`); `has_one :article_activity, dependent: :delete` (`:180`).
- `has_many` with **delete_all**: `mentions` (`:170`), `context_notifications` (`:172`), `feed_events` (`:176`), `notification_subscriptions` (`:177`), `notifications` (`:178`), `page_views` (`:179`), `profile_pins` (`:184`), `context_notes` (`:189`).
- `has_many` with **destroy**: `polls` (`:183`), `rating_votes` (`:187`), `trend_memberships` (`:192`), `concept_memberships` (`:195`).
- `has_many` with **nullify**: `comments` (`:171`), `ai_audits` (`:173`).
- `has_many` no dependent: `tag_adjustments` (`:188`); `acts_as_taggable_on :tags` (`:12`).
- through/scoped: `trends` (`:193`), `concepts` (`:196`), `top_comments` & 4 sibling comment scopes (`:198-241`).

**Contract a teammate must know:**
- Mixed teardown strategies (`delete`/`delete_all` skip callbacks; `destroy`/`nullify` run them). Comments are **nullified, not deleted** — `Destroyer` caches comment ids first to clean notifications (`article.rb:171`, `services/articles/destroyer.rb:11`).
- `before_destroy :before_destroy_actions, prepend: true` (`article.rb:313`) busts caches and enqueues `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker` for the author's & org's other articles (`article.rb:1408-1420`).
- Two serialized cached columns `cached_user`, `cached_organization` (YAML, `article.rb:386,390`) + `ATTRIBUTES_CACHED_FOR_RELATED_ENTITY` (`:30`).
- A `hair_trigger` DB trigger maintains `reading_list_document` tsvector (`article.rb:359-382`) and `pg_search_scope :search_articles` (`:396`).
- `has_neighbors :semantic_embedding` (pgvector, `:329`); dropping that column must raise `IrreversibleMigration` (per AGENTS.md).
- `published` scope = `published: true AND published_at <= now` (`:411`) — the canonical "is this live" definition.

---

## Step 3 — Lifecycle: what fans out on create/update/destroy

**Entry points:** `Articles::Creator` (`services/articles/creator.rb:26`), `Articles::Updater` (`services/articles/updater.rb:15`), `Articles::Unpublish` → Updater (`services/articles/unpublish.rb:14`), `Articles::Destroyer` (`services/articles/destroyer.rb:5`). Plus admin/moderation bulk paths (`Moderator::UnpublishAllArticles`, `Users::DeleteArticles`).

**Inline (synchronous) callbacks** (`article.rb`):
- `before_validation` chain: markdown eval, slug, dates, title normalize, unicode strip, video embed, subforem (`:295-304`).
- `before_save`: `set_cached_entities` (`:305`), `set_all_dates`, `calculate_base_scores`, `fetch_video_duration`, `set_caches`, `detect_language` (`:306-311`); `sync_tags_array` (Taggable).
- `after_save`: `bust_cache` → Fastly `purge` + enqueue async bust + touch user/org timestamps (`:316`, body `:1663-1667`); `collection_cleanup` (`:317`); `generate_social_image` → enqueues `Images::SocialImageWorker` (`:318`, `:1669-1676`); `generate_context_notes` (`:319`); `create_conditional_autovomits` → `Articles::HandleSpamWorker` (`:315`, `:1682-1690`).
- `after_update_commit`: `update_notifications` (`:321`), `update_notification_subscriptions` (`:324`), `update_dependent_embeds_if_key_info_changed` (`:341`), `regenerate_summary_if_content_changed` (`:343`).
- Updater inline effects: `Mentions::CreateAll.call` (`updater.rb:79`), notification removal on unpublish (`:83-97`), `EdgeCache::BustUser` (`:100`), audience-segment refresh / onboarding completion (`:54-61`).

**Asynchronous (Sidekiq) fan-out:**
- `after_commit` create/update: `enqueue_generate_embedding` → `GenerateArticleEmbeddingWorker` (`article.rb:334`), `async_score_calc` → `Articles::ScoreCalcWorker` (`:338`, `:1122`), `touch_collection`, `enrich_image_attributes` → `Articles::EnrichImageAttributesWorker` (`:1700`), `detect_code_block_languages` → `Articles::DetectCodeBlockLanguagesWorker` (`:1706`).
- `after_commit` create/update/destroy: `recompile_organization_pages` → `Organizations::RecompilePagesWorker` (`:345`, `:1729`).
- `bust_cache` → `Articles::BustCacheWorker` → `EdgeCache::BustArticle.call` (purges article/user/org, home/tag/profile pages) (`workers/articles/bust_cache_worker.rb`, `services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:9`).
- Concerns: `SyncLiquidEmbedReferencesWorker`, `SyncWebpageReferencesWorker` on body change; `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` after destroy.
- **Destroy:** `before_destroy_actions` → `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker.perform_bulk` (`article.rb:1419`); `Destroyer` → `Notification.remove_all` for article + cached comment ids, `EdgeCache::BustUser` (`destroyer.rb:15-21`).

---

## Step 4 — Every dependent of the Article contract

### A. Associated models (records that hang off an Article — break if teardown/columns change)
- `app/models/reaction.rb:5` — polymorphic `reactable`; `only_articles`/`for_articles` scopes (`:23-24`), vomit scopes use `user.article_ids` (`:31`).
- `app/models/comment.rb:31` — polymorphic `commentable`; validates `published_article` (`:67`), `commentable_is_article?` triggers interest-embedding & activity updates (`:87,:90`).
- `app/models/mention.rb:10` — polymorphic `mentionable` (delete_all from Article).
- `app/models/notification.rb:5` — polymorphic `notifiable`; `for_published_articles` scope (`:16`), milestone enqueue (`:135`).
- `app/models/notification_subscription.rb:9` — polymorphic `notifiable`.
- `app/models/context_notification.rb:7` — polymorphic `context` (article-published notifications).
- `app/models/context_note.rb:2` — `belongs_to :article`, uniqueness scope tag (`:7`).
- `app/models/profile_pin.rb:5` — polymorphic `pinnable`.
- `app/models/page_view.rb:6` — `belongs_to :article`; enqueues `Articles::UpdateArticleActivityWorker` (`:24`).
- `app/models/article_activity.rb:16` — `belongs_to :article`, per-article analytics rollup (raw SQL upserts `:192,:210`).
- `app/models/rating_vote.rb:2` — `belongs_to :article`, counter_culture (`:15`), assigns rating (`:13,:20`).
- `app/models/poll.rb:12` — `belongs_to :article` optional.
- `app/models/trend_membership.rb:3` — `belongs_to :article`, trend counter_cache (`:2`).
- `app/models/concept_membership.rb:3` — polymorphic `record`.
- `app/models/ai_audit.rb:3` — polymorphic `affected_content` (nullify).
- `app/models/discussion_lock.rb:9` — `belongs_to :article`, uniqueness (`:14`).
- `app/models/tag_adjustment.rb:11` — `belongs_to :article`; validates against `article.tag_list` (`:29-36`).
- `app/models/feed_event.rb:6` — `belongs_to :article`; `update_article_counters_and_scores` (`:10`), bulk counter update (`:59`).
- `app/models/user_subscription.rb:12` — polymorphic `user_subscription_sourceable`.
- `app/models/webpage_reference.rb:2` & `app/models/liquid_embed_reference.rb:2` — polymorphic `record` (from concerns).
- `app/models/feeds/import_item.rb:7` — `belongs_to :article` optional (RSS import dedupe).
- `app/models/collection.rb`, `app/models/organization.rb`, `app/models/user.rb` — own the inverse `has_many :articles` and `article_ids`/counter caches used in teardown (`article.rb:1410-1413`).

### B. Request handling (controllers)
- `app/controllers/articles_controller.rb` — primary CRUD; calls Creator/Updater/Destroyer.
- `app/controllers/api/v0/articles_controller.rb`, `app/controllers/api/v1/articles_controller.rb`, `app/controllers/concerns/api/articles_controller.rb` — API CRUD/index.
- `app/controllers/stories_controller.rb`, `stories/feeds_controller.rb`, `stories/tagged_articles_controller.rb`, `stories/pinned_articles_controller.rb`, `stories/articles_search_controller.rb` — read/feed rendering.
- `app/controllers/article_approvals_controller.rb` — approve toggle.
- `app/controllers/video_states_controller.rb`, `videos_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/videos_controller.rb` — video article updates.
- `app/controllers/dashboards_controller.rb`, `pages_controller.rb`, `community_controller.rb`, `sidebars_controller.rb`, `sitemaps_controller.rb`, `search_controller.rb`, `trends_controller.rb`, `bottom_items_controller.rb` — list/embed articles.
- `app/controllers/comments_controller.rb`, `reactions_controller.rb`, `api/v1/reactions_controller.rb`, `profile_pins_controller.rb`, `discussion_locks_controller.rb`, `tag_adjustments_controller.rb`, `page_views_controller.rb`, `moderations_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/readinglist_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/analytics_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/organizations_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/users_controller.rb`, `concerns/api/trends_controller.rb`, `admin/articles_controller.rb`, `admin/reactions_controller.rb`, `admin/users_controller.rb`, `admin/feedback_messages_controller.rb`, `admin/welcome_controller.rb`, `admin/tools_controller.rb` — act on articles or attached data.

### C. Background work (workers)
`app/workers/articles/`: `bust_cache_worker.rb`, `bust_multiple_caches_worker.rb`, `score_calc_worker.rb`, `handle_spam_worker.rb`, `enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb`, `detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb`, `generate_summary_worker.rb`, `generate_context_note_worker.rb`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb`, `update_article_activity_worker.rb`, `update_page_views_worker.rb`, `update_organic_page_views_worker.rb`, `publish_worker.rb`, `quality_reaction_worker.rb`, `label_cleanup_worker.rb`, `backfill_activities_worker.rb`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb`. Plus: `app/workers/generate_article_embedding_worker.rb`, `update_user_interest_embedding_worker.rb`, `images/social_image_worker.rb`, `organizations/save_article_worker.rb`, `organizations/update_organization_articles_paths_worker.rb`, `moderator/sink_articles_worker.rb`, `moderator/unpublish_all_articles_worker.rb`, `users/resave_articles_worker.rb` (`:14` resaves all user articles), `feeds/import_articles_worker.rb`, `notifications/milestone_worker.rb`, `notifications/notifiable_action_worker.rb`, `notifications/remove_all_worker.rb`, `notifications/update_worker.rb`, `notifications/subforem_change_notification_worker.rb`, `notifications/create_round_robin_moderation_notifications_worker.rb`, `notification_subscriptions/update_worker.rb`, `reactions/bust_homepage_cache_worker.rb`, `reactions/bust_reactable_cache_worker.rb`, `reactions/update_relevant_scores_worker.rb`, `reaction_counter_sync_worker.rb`, `rating_votes/assign_rating_worker.rb`, `comments/bust_cache_worker.rb`, `follows/update_points_worker.rb`, `linked_domains/update_score_worker.rb`, `concepts/{backfill_classifier,classify_record,daily_metrics,lookback}_worker.rb`, `metrics/record_daily_usage_worker.rb`, `metrics/record_data_counts_worker.rb`, `emails/send_user_digest_worker.rb`.

### D. Feeds & ranking
- `app/services/articles/feeds.rb` and `app/services/articles/feeds/`: `basic.rb` (`Article.published` `:13`), `latest.rb`, `tag.rb`, `timeframe.rb`, `custom.rb`, `large_forem_experimental.rb`, `variant_query.rb`, `find_featured_story.rb`, `article_score_calculator_for_user.rb`.
- `app/models/articles/feeds.rb`, `app/models/articles/cached_entity.rb`, `app/models/concerns/feeds/stateful.rb`, `app/models/feeds/*` (lever_catalog_builder, order_by_lever, relevancy_lever, variant_assembler).
- `app/queries/homepage/articles_query.rb`, `app/services/homepage/fetch_articles.rb` (`approved`/`published_at` filters `:12-13`), `app/queries/articles/active_threads_query.rb`, `app/queries/articles/api_search_query.rb`.
- `app/services/feed_events/bulk_upsert.rb`, `app/services/feeds/{import,assemble_article_markdown,check_item_previously_imported}.rb`, `app/serializers/homepage/article_serializer.rb`.
- `app/services/ai/trend_detector.rb`, `app/workers/identify_trends_worker.rb`.

### E. Notifications & mentions
- `app/services/mentions/create_all.rb:42,79,86` — parses `processed_html`, creates Mentions, sends notification.
- `app/services/notifications.rb`, `notifications/milestone/send.rb`, `notifications/moderation/send.rb`, `notifications/new_comment/send.rb`, `notifications/new_mention/send.rb`, `notifications/notifiable_action/send.rb`, `notifications/reactions/{send,reaction_data}.rb`, `notifications/remove_all.rb`, `notifications/remove_all_by_action.rb`, `notifications/remove_by_spammer.rb`, `notifications/subforem_change_notification/send.rb`, `notifications/update.rb`.
- `app/services/notification_subscriptions/{subscribe,update}.rb`, `app/services/slack/messengers/article_published.rb`, `app/services/broadcasts/welcome_notification/generator.rb`.
- `app/decorators/notification_decorator.rb`, `app/decorators/mention_decorator.rb`.

### F. Caching
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:9` — full purge (article/user/org/home/tag/profile pages).
- `app/services/edge_cache/bust_comment.rb`, `bust_user.rb`, `bust_organization.rb`, `bust_tag.rb`, `purge_by_key.rb`.
- `app/models/concerns/purgeable.rb` (Fastly purge), Article class methods `cached_admin_published_with`/`bust_cached_admin_published_with` (`article.rb:450,463`), `bust_cached_admin_welcome_thread` (`:1766`).
- `app/services/articles/cached_entity` serialization (`cached_user`/`cached_organization`).

### G. Analytics & metrics
- `app/services/analytics_service.rb`, `app/services/admin/charts_data.rb`, `app/services/admin/stats_data.rb`, `app/services/user_activity_heatmap_service.rb`.
- `app/services/article_api_index_service.rb`, `app/models/article_activity.rb` rollups, `app/services/articles/page_view_updater.rb`, `app/workers/page_view_rollup_worker.rb`, `app/services/page_view_rollup.rb`.
- `app/services/email_digest_article_collector.rb`, `app/services/email_digest.rb`, `app/services/ai/email_digest_summary.rb`, `app/services/exporter/articles.rb` & `exporter/service.rb`.
- Search: `app/services/search/{article,reading_list}.rb`, `app/serializers/search/reading_list_article_serializer.rb`, `algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb`, `app/workers/algolia_search/*`.

### H. Moderation
- `app/services/moderator/{sink_articles,unpublish_all_articles,manage_activity_and_roles}.rb`, `app/services/moderations/article_fetcher_service.rb`.
- `app/services/spam/{handler,reaction_ring_detector}.rb`, `app/services/articles/handle_spam_worker.rb` path, `create_conditional_autovomits` (`article.rb:1682`).
- `app/services/ai/{article_check,article_quality_assessor,content_moderation_labeler,article_enhancer,article_summary_generator,freeform_context_note_generator}.rb`, `automod_label` enum + `AUTOMOD_SCORE_ADJUSTMENTS` (`article.rb:132-166`).
- `app/policies/article_policy.rb`, `pinned_article_policy.rb`, `video_policy.rb`.
- `app/queries/audit_log/unpublish_alls_query.rb`.

### I. Onboarding / lifecycle / teardown
- `app/services/articles/{creator,updater,destroyer,unpublish,builder,attributes,suggest,suggest_stickies,get_user_stickies}.rb`.
- `app/services/users/delete_articles.rb:8-24` — **manually** deletes reactions/comments/discussion_lock/context_notes/article_activity/trend_memberships/profile_pins then `article.delete` (bypasses callbacks/`dependent:`) — duplicates the teardown contract.
- `app/services/users/delete.rb`, `app/services/users/update.rb`, `app/services/organizations/delete.rb`, `app/services/subforem_reassignment_service.rb`.
- `app/services/badges/{award_first_post,award_streak,award_tag,award_thumbs_up}.rb`, `app/services/scheduled_automations/{article_content_badge_awarder,first_post_badge_awarder,warm_welcome_badge_awarder,executor}.rb`.
- `app/services/article_with_video_creation_service.rb`, `app/services/content_renderer.rb`, `app/services/liquid_embed_extractor.rb`, `app/services/medium_article_retrieval_service.rb`.
- `app/decorators/article_decorator.rb`, `app/serializers/homepage/article_serializer.rb`, `app/queries/articles/api_search_query.rb`.

---

## Step 5 — How article identity & visibility are guarded

**Async worker re-fetch + existence guard** (record may be gone by the time the job runs): every `app/workers/articles/*` job does `Article.find_by(id:)` then `return unless article` — `bust_cache_worker.rb:4-6`, `score_calc_worker.rb:8-9`, `handle_spam_worker.rb:8-9`, `enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb:8-9`, `detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb:10-11`, `generate_summary_worker.rb:13-14`, `generate_context_note_worker.rb:8-9`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:9-10`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb:7`. `update_article_activity_worker.rb:89` uses `Article.exists?(id:)`. `EdgeCache::BustArticle.call` opens with `return unless article` (`bust_article.rb:11`); `BustCacheBaseWorker` chain.

**"Real & current & published" gates:**
- Canonical scope `published` = `published: true AND published_at <= Time.current` (`article.rb:411`) — used by feeds (`feeds/basic.rb:13`), `EdgeCache::BustArticle` home/tag busting (`bust_article.rb:34,50,58`), `homepage/fetch_articles.rb`, `moderator/unpublish_all_articles.rb:25`.
- `indexable` for search = `published && score.positive? && published_at < Time.current` (`searchable_article.rb:42`); `indexable_changed?` (`:46`) gates re-index.
- `skip_indexing?`/`skip_indexing_reason` for crawlers = unpublished / low score / old / negative (`article.rb:901,911`).
- AI/quality jobs add score thresholds: `generate_summary_worker.rb:16`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:13-15` (`score`, `comment_score`, `published_at` within a week, no existing notes), `handle_spam_worker.rb:16`.
- Visibility/path: `current_state_path` returns preview URL with `password` when unpublished/scheduled (`article.rb:879`); `scheduled?` (`:663`); `displayable_published_at` prefers `crossposted_at` (`:920`).
- Comment validity: `Comment#published_article` validation requires a published commentable (`comment.rb:67`); `commentable_is_article?` guards activity/embedding callbacks (`comment.rb:87,90`).
- Mentions guard against author and re-parse live `processed_html` (`mentions/create_all.rb:42,54-59`).
- Concern guards re-check responders: `LiquidEmbeddable#should_sync_liquid_embed_metadata?` (`:13`), `Taggable#sync_tags_array` column check (`:60`), `Purgeable#fastly`/`#purge` short-circuit when Fastly unconfigured (`purgeable.rb:26,49`).
- Subforem scoping: `from_subforem` scope (`article.rb:428`) filters by `RequestStore` subforem context.

---

## Step 6 — Blast radius of the contract change (ranked by risk)

Since the rework changes **how an Article stores and tears down attached data**, the highest risk is in the destroy/dependent path and anything that duplicates or bypasses it.

**🔴 Highest — will break / data loss if teardown semantics change:**
1. `app/services/users/delete_articles.rb:8-24` — hand-rolls the teardown (`delete_all` on reactions/comments/locks/notes/activity/trends/pins, then `article.delete` which **skips callbacks and `dependent:`**). Any association you add/retarget must be mirrored here or it orphans rows. Highest pager risk.
2. The `dependent:` associations themselves (`article.rb:168-196`) — mixed `delete/delete_all/destroy/nullify`. Changing a column or association alters cascade behavior; `nullify` on `comments` (`:171`) is relied on by `Destroyer` caching comment ids (`destroyer.rb:11`).
3. `app/services/articles/destroyer.rb:11-21` — orders comment-id capture before `destroy!`, then `Notification.remove_all` + `EdgeCache::BustUser`. Breaks if comment teardown stops nullifying.
4. `before_destroy_actions` (`article.rb:1408-1420`) + `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker` — relies on `user.article_ids`/`organization.article_ids`; counter_culture (`:50-51`) and `latest_article_updated_at` touches (`:1656-1661`).
5. Concern teardown hooks: `WebpageTrackable` capture-before-destroy + `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` (`webpage_trackable.rb:8-9,18-25`); `Reactable`/`LiquidEmbeddable`/`UserSubscriptionSourceable` dependent settings.

**🟠 High — likely to break on attached-data changes:**
6. `article_activity.rb` raw-SQL rollups (`:192,:210`) + `page_view.rb:24` enqueue + `update_article_activity_worker.rb`.
7. `feed_event.rb:10,59` counter/score recompute; feeds services (`articles/feeds/*`) and `feed_events/bulk_upsert.rb`.
8. Notifications cleanup paths: `updater.rb:83-97`, `moderator/unpublish_all_articles.rb:55-65`, `notifications/remove_*` services — all key off article/comment/mention ids.
9. `rating_vote.rb:15`/`trend_membership.rb:2` counter_caches; `tag_adjustment.rb:29-36` reads `article.tag_list`.
10. Search/embeddings: `searchable_article.rb`, `GenerateArticleEmbeddingWorker`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb`, `has_neighbors :semantic_embedding` (`article.rb:329`) — pgvector column is irreversible (AGENTS.md).

**🟡 Medium — re-verify (read paths, derived data):**
11. Cache busting (`edge_cache/bust_article.rb`, `purgeable.rb`, admin welcome-thread cache `article.rb:1766`), serialized `cached_user`/`cached_organization` (`:386,390`) + reading_list trigger (`:359`).
12. Analytics/exports (`analytics_service.rb`, `admin/charts_data.rb`, `exporter/articles.rb`, `email_digest_article_collector.rb`).
13. Controllers in §B and API serializers/decorators — surface errors if associations/columns move.
14. AI/moderation services (§H) — score/label dependent.

**🟢 Lower — verify but resilient (already guard with `find_by`/`return unless`):** the `app/workers/articles/*` jobs (Step 5) tolerate missing records, but their *behavioral* assumptions (score thresholds, published gates) need re-check.

---

**Edit (model + shared pieces):**
- `app/models/article.rb` — association block `:168-196`, `before_destroy_actions` `:1408-1420`, `bust_cache`/`touch_actor_latest_article_updated_at` `:1656-1667`, serialized caches `:386-390`, counter_culture `:50-51`.

---

# Article Contract Audit — Forem

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What it is.** Forem is the Rails monolith that powers dev.to: a social blogging/community platform. Ruby on Rails (Rails 8-prep, see `cdb805c`), Sidekiq for background jobs, PostgreSQL (with `pgvector`, hair_trigger DB triggers, pg_search), Fastly edge caching, Algolia search, Preact frontend.

**Layout** (`app/`):
- `models/` — ActiveRecord; concerns in `models/concerns/`, namespaced helpers in `models/articles/`, `models/feeds/`.
- `services/` — business logic (PORO service objects, e.g. `services/articles/`, `services/notifications/`, `services/edge_cache/`, `services/feeds/`, `services/mentions/`).
- `workers/` — Sidekiq jobs (`workers/articles/`, etc.).
- `controllers/`, `queries/`, `policies/`, `decorators/`, `serializers/`, `liquid_tags/`, `views/`.

**The central content model.** `app/models/article.rb` (1858 lines) — the thing readers publish; comments, reactions, tags, mentions, notifications, feeds and analytics all hang off it. It is built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/` and a serialization/caching helper namespace `app/models/articles/` (`cached_entity.rb`, `feeds.rb`). Its lifecycle is driven by `app/services/articles/` (`creator.rb`, `updater.rb`, `destroyer.rb`, `unpublish.rb`) and fans out to `app/workers/articles/` + `app/services/edge_cache/`.

---

## Step 2 — The Article contract and what it's built on

**Model:** `app/models/article.rb:1`

**Concerns included** (`article.rb:2-10`), each with its own associations/callbacks the teardown must respect:
- `LiquidEmbeddable` — `app/models/concerns/liquid_embeddable.rb:1`; adds `has_many :liquid_embed_references, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`), syncs on body/score/published change.
- `Reactable` — `app/models/concerns/reactable.rb:1`; adds `has_many :reactions, dependent: :destroy` (`:5`) + `distinct_reaction_categories`, count-sync helpers.
- `Taggable` — `app/models/concerns/taggable.rb:1`; `cached_tagged_with*` scopes (`:6,:28,:53`), `before_save :sync_tags_array` (`:57`).
- `UserSubscriptionSourceable` — `app/models/concerns/user_subscription_sourceable.rb:1`; `has_many :user_subscriptions, dependent: :nullify` (`:7`).
- `AlgoliaSearchable` — `app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable.rb:1` → mixes in `AlgoliaSearchable::SearchableArticle` (`app/models/concerns/algolia_searchable/searchable_article.rb:1`); indexes title/body/user, `indexable` gate at `:42`.
- `WebpageTrackable` — `app/models/concerns/webpage_trackable.rb:1`; `has_many :webpage_references, dependent: :delete_all` (`:5`), captures domains before destroy (`:8`), enqueues `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` after destroy (`:9`).
- `CloudinaryHelper`, `ActionView::Helpers` (view helpers), `PgSearch::Model` (search), plus `StringAttributeCleaner` (`article.rb:15`).
- Note: `Trackable` (`app/models/concerns/trackable.rb`) is **not** included by Article (only `app/models/user.rb`) — a teammate should not assume Article fires trackable events.

**Associations defined directly** (`article.rb:44-241`) — the teardown surface:
- `belongs_to`: `collection` (optional, `:44`), `organization` (optional, `:46`), `user` (`:47`), `subforem` (optional, `:48`); `counter_culture :user`/`:organization` (`:50-51`).
- `has_one :discussion_lock, dependent: :delete` (`:168`); `has_one :article_activity, dependent: :delete` (`:180`).
- `has_many` with **delete_all**: `mentions` (`:170`), `context_notifications` (`:172`), `feed_events` (`:176`), `notification_subscriptions` (`:177`), `notifications` (`:178`), `page_views` (`:179`), `profile_pins` (`:184`), `context_notes` (`:189`).
- `has_many` with **destroy**: `polls` (`:183`), `rating_votes` (`:187`), `trend_memberships` (`:192`), `concept_memberships` (`:195`).
- `has_many` with **nullify**: `comments` (`:171`), `ai_audits` (`:173`).
- `has_many` no dependent: `tag_adjustments` (`:188`); `acts_as_taggable_on :tags` (`:12`).
- through/scoped: `trends` (`:193`), `concepts` (`:196`), `top_comments` & 4 sibling comment scopes (`:198-241`).

**Contract a teammate must know:**
- Mixed teardown strategies (`delete`/`delete_all` skip callbacks; `destroy`/`nullify` run them). Comments are **nullified, not deleted** — `Destroyer` caches comment ids first to clean notifications (`article.rb:171`, `services/articles/destroyer.rb:11`).
- `before_destroy :before_destroy_actions, prepend: true` (`article.rb:313`) busts caches and enqueues `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker` for the author's & org's other articles (`article.rb:1408-1420`).
- Two serialized cached columns `cached_user`, `cached_organization` (YAML, `article.rb:386,390`) + `ATTRIBUTES_CACHED_FOR_RELATED_ENTITY` (`:30`).
- A `hair_trigger` DB trigger maintains `reading_list_document` tsvector (`article.rb:359-382`) and `pg_search_scope :search_articles` (`:396`).
- `has_neighbors :semantic_embedding` (pgvector, `:329`); dropping that column must raise `IrreversibleMigration` (per AGENTS.md).
- `published` scope = `published: true AND published_at <= now` (`:411`) — the canonical "is this live" definition.

## Step 3 — Lifecycle: what fans out on create/update/destroy

**Entry points:** `Articles::Creator` (`services/articles/creator.rb:26`), `Articles::Updater` (`services/articles/updater.rb:15`), `Articles::Unpublish` → Updater (`services/articles/unpublish.rb:14`), `Articles::Destroyer` (`services/articles/destroyer.rb:5`). Plus admin/moderation bulk paths (`Moderator::UnpublishAllArticles`, `Users::DeleteArticles`).

**Inline (synchronous) callbacks** (`article.rb`):
- `before_validation` chain: markdown eval, slug, dates, title normalize, unicode strip, video embed, subforem (`:295-304`).
- `before_save`: `set_cached_entities` (`:305`), `set_all_dates`, `calculate_base_scores`, `fetch_video_duration`, `set_caches`, `detect_language` (`:306-311`); `sync_tags_array` (Taggable).
- `after_save`: `bust_cache` → Fastly `purge` + enqueue async bust + touch user/org timestamps (`:316`, body `:1663-1667`); `collection_cleanup` (`:317`); `generate_social_image` → enqueues `Images::SocialImageWorker` (`:318`, `:1669-1676`); `generate_context_notes` (`:319`); `create_conditional_autovomits` → `Articles::HandleSpamWorker` (`:315`, `:1682-1690`).
- `after_update_commit`: `update_notifications` (`:321`), `update_notification_subscriptions` (`:324`), `update_dependent_embeds_if_key_info_changed` (`:341`), `regenerate_summary_if_content_changed` (`:343`).
- Updater inline effects: `Mentions::CreateAll.call` (`updater.rb:79`), notification removal on unpublish (`:83-97`), `EdgeCache::BustUser` (`:100`), audience-segment refresh / onboarding completion (`:54-61`).

**Asynchronous (Sidekiq) fan-out:**
- `after_commit` create/update: `enqueue_generate_embedding` → `GenerateArticleEmbeddingWorker` (`article.rb:334`), `async_score_calc` → `Articles::ScoreCalcWorker` (`:338`, `:1122`), `touch_collection`, `enrich_image_attributes` → `Articles::EnrichImageAttributesWorker` (`:1700`), `detect_code_block_languages` → `Articles::DetectCodeBlockLanguagesWorker` (`:1706`).
- `after_commit` create/update/destroy: `recompile_organization_pages` → `Organizations::RecompilePagesWorker` (`:345`, `:1729`).
- `bust_cache` → `Articles::BustCacheWorker` → `EdgeCache::BustArticle.call` (purges article/user/org, home/tag/profile pages) (`workers/articles/bust_cache_worker.rb`, `services/edge_cache/bust_article.rb:9`).
- Concerns: `SyncLiquidEmbedReferencesWorker`, `SyncWebpageReferencesWorker` on body change; `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` after destroy.
- **Destroy:** `before_destroy_actions` → `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker.perform_bulk` (`article.rb:1419`); `Destroyer` → `Notification.remove_all` for article + cached comment ids, `EdgeCache::BustUser` (`destroyer.rb:15-21`).

## Step 5 — How article identity & visibility are guarded

**Async worker re-fetch + existence guard** (record may be gone by the time the job runs): every `app/workers/articles/*` job does `Article.find_by(id:)` then `return unless article` — `bust_cache_worker.rb:4-6`, `score_calc_worker.rb:8-9`, `handle_spam_worker.rb:8-9`, `enrich_image_attributes_worker.rb:8-9`, `detect_code_block_languages_worker.rb:10-11`, `generate_summary_worker.rb:13-14`, `generate_context_note_worker.rb:8-9`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:9-10`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb:7`. `update_article_activity_worker.rb:89` uses `Article.exists?(id:)`. `EdgeCache::BustArticle.call` opens with `return unless article` (`bust_article.rb:11`); `BustCacheBaseWorker` chain.

**"Real & current & published" gates:**
- Canonical scope `published` = `published: true AND published_at <= Time.current` (`article.rb:411`) — used by feeds (`feeds/basic.rb:13`), `EdgeCache::BustArticle` home/tag busting (`bust_article.rb:34,50,58`), `homepage/fetch_articles.rb`, `moderator/unpublish_all_articles.rb:25`.
- `indexable` for search = `published && score.positive? && published_at < Time.current` (`searchable_article.rb:42`); `indexable_changed?` (`:46`) gates re-index.
- `skip_indexing?`/`skip_indexing_reason` for crawlers = unpublished / low score / old / negative (`article.rb:901,911`).
- AI/quality jobs add score thresholds: `generate_summary_worker.rb:16`, `generate_freeform_context_note_worker.rb:13-15` (`score`, `comment_score`, `published_at` within a week, no existing notes), `handle_spam_worker.rb:16`.
- Visibility/path: `current_state_path` returns preview URL with `password` when unpublished/scheduled (`article.rb:879`); `scheduled?` (`:663`); `displayable_published_at` prefers `crossposted_at` (`:920`).
- Comment validity: `Comment#published_article` validation requires a published commentable (`comment.rb:67`); `commentable_is_article?` guards activity/embedding callbacks (`comment.rb:87,90`).
- Mentions guard against author and re-parse live `processed_html` (`mentions/create_all.rb:42,54-59`).
- Concern guards re-check responders: `LiquidEmbeddable#should_sync_liquid_embed_metadata?` (`:13`), `Taggable#sync_tags_array` column check (`:60`), `Purgeable#fastly`/`#purge` short-circuit when Fastly unconfigured (`purgeable.rb:26,49`).
- Subforem scoping: `from_subforem` scope (`article.rb:428`) filters by `RequestStore` subforem context.

## Step 6 — Blast radius of the contract change (ranked by risk)

Since the rework changes **how an Article stores and tears down attached data**, the highest risk is in the destroy/dependent path and anything that duplicates or bypasses it.

**🔴 Highest — will break / data loss if teardown semantics change:**
1. `app/services/users/delete_articles.rb:8-24` — hand-rolls the teardown (`delete_all` on reactions/comments/locks/notes/activity/trends/pins, then `article.delete` which **skips callbacks and `dependent:`**). Any association you add/retarget must be mirrored here or it orphans rows. Highest pager risk.
2. The `dependent:` associations themselves (`article.rb:168-196`) — mixed `delete/delete_all/destroy/nullify`. Changing a column or association alters cascade behavior; `nullify` on `comments` (`:171`) is relied on by `Destroyer` caching comment ids (`destroyer.rb:11`).
3. `app/services/articles/destroyer.rb:11-21` — orders comment-id capture before `destroy!`, then `Notification.remove_all` + `EdgeCache::BustUser`. Breaks if comment teardown stops nullifying.
4. `before_destroy_actions` (`article.rb:1408-1420`) + `Articles::BustMultipleCachesWorker` — relies on `user.article_ids`/`organization.article_ids`; counter_culture (`:50-51`) and `latest_article_updated_at` touches (`:1656-1661`).
5. Concern teardown hooks: `WebpageTrackable` capture-before-destroy + `LinkedDomains::UpdateScoreWorker` (`webpage_trackable.rb:8-9,18-25`); `Reactable`/`LiquidEmbeddable`/`UserSubscriptionSourceable` dependent settings.

**🟠 High — likely to break on attached-data changes:**
6. `article_activity.rb` raw-SQL rollups (`:192,:210`) + `page_view.rb:24` enqueue + `update_article_activity_worker.rb`.
7. `feed_event.rb:10,59` counter/score recompute; feeds services (`articles/feeds/*`) and `feed_events/bulk_upsert.rb`.
8. Notifications cleanup paths: `updater.rb:83-97`, `moderator/unpublish_all_articles.rb:55-65`, `notifications/remove_*` services — all key off article/comment/mention ids.
9. `rating_vote.rb:15`/`trend_membership.rb:2` counter_caches; `tag_adjustment.rb:29-36` reads `article.tag_list`.
10. Search/embeddings: `searchable_article.rb`, `GenerateArticleEmbeddingWorker`, `update_dependent_embeds_worker.rb`, `has_neighbors :semantic_embedding` (`article.rb:329`) — pgvector column is irreversible (AGENTS.md).

**🟡 Medium — re-verify (read paths, derived data):**
11. Cache busting (`edge_cache/bust_article.rb`, `purgeable.rb`, admin welcome-thread cache `article.rb:1766`), serialized `cached_user`/`cached_organization` (`:386,390`) + reading_list trigger (`:359`).
12. Analytics/exports (`analytics_service.rb`, `admin/charts_data.rb`, `exporter/articles.rb`, `email_digest_article_collector.rb`).
13. Controllers in §B and API serializers/decorators — surface errors if associations/columns move.
14. AI/moderation services (§H) — score/label dependent.

**🟢 Lower — verify but resilient (already guard with `find_by`/`return unless`):** the `app/workers/articles/*` jobs (Step 5) tolerate missing records, but their *behavioral* assumptions (score thresholds, published gates) need re-check.
